name: Anthemis
description: Anthemis is a leading global venture investment firm focused on fintech. We invest in and build early stage fintech companies that we believe will transform the financial services industry for the Information Age. Since 2010, Anthemis has made more than 90 investments and we bring 150+ years of partner domain expertise.

[ ![](https://www.anthemis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/menu.svg) ](https://www.anthemis.com/about/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjQ3MzciLCJ0b2dnbGUiOmZhbHNlfQ%3D%3D)
## We deploy financial, human and intellectual capital in service of a better system. We back early-stage founders at the intersections of industry, technology and society.
## Our Founders
## “The digital economy is the nervous system of modern society, connecting people, ideas and industries. We invest in a generation of businesses that are reimagining technology, finance, and beyond as essential enablers of a more inclusive, sustainable, and resilient world.”
[ Amy Nauiokas ](https://www.anthemis.com/team/amy-nauiokas/)
[ Sean Park ](https://www.anthemis.com/team/sean-park/)
## Our
Mission
## To architect a more equitable, sustainable and human-centred digital economy, where technology and innovation work together in service of a better society
## We bring together investors, entrepreneurs, incumbent players, market innovators, influencers, change agents, academics and policymakers. Together, we harness the transformative power of technology, finance, people, ideas and capital, so all of us can thrive.
## Our
Ecosystem
## Guiding
Principles
## Authentic Collaboration
### Transformative change in the economic system is an evolution, not a revolution. We cultivate a collaborative ecosystem to invest, grow and transform across the globe.
## Virtuous Cycle Outcomes
### The world needs a more resilient, sustainable and inclusive economic system. We invest in companies that embody non-zero sum mindsets and are committed to generating a net positive impact on the world.
## Diversity and Inclusivity
### We believe that to successfully cultivate change in our industry and our world, teams must commit to diversity, equity and inclusivity at their core. We have built our company on this principle and we only invest in companies that do the same.
## Join the Movement
[ Sign up for email updates ](https://www.anthemis.com/about/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjY3OTYiLCJ0b2dnbGUiOmZhbHNlfQ%3D%3D)
[ Connect with us on Linkedin ](https://www.linkedin.com/company/1342997?trk=tyah&trkInfo=clickedVertical%3Acompany%2CclickedEntityId%3A1342997%2Cidx%3A2-1-2%2CtarId%3A1469475736270%2Ctas%3Aanthemis%20group%20)
[ Follow us on Instagram ](https://www.instagram.com/anthemisgroup/)
## [About ](https://www.anthemis.com/about/) ## [Companies ](https://www.anthemis.com/portfolio/) ## [Careers ](https://www.anthemis.com/careers/) ## [Team ](https://www.anthemis.com/team/)
Investing is not a neutral act. It can reinforce the status quo. Or, it can _spark change_.
Finance is our economy’s _nervous system_ : without it, society would cease to function.
We are investing in a generation, of businesses that will _reinvigorate finance_ , as an essential, but essentially subordinate, contributor to society.

tagline: We deploy financial, human and intellectual capital in service of a better system.

tavily.answer:
Anthemis' official website is anthemis.com. It is a venture capital firm founded in 2010. It invests in early-stage companies in technology and finance.
Anthemis Group is a venture capital firm focused on early-stage investments in finance, AI, and other sectors. Founded in 2010, it has four funding rounds and is based in New York and London. The firm supports entrepreneurs in creating a sustainable future.
Anthemis is a London-based fintech firm focused on early-stage investments, particularly in companies founded by women. It aims to create a more equitable digital economy. Anthemis has raised $200 million for its third fund.
Anthemis is a major early-stage fintech fund for women-founded companies, and Wellfound is a platform praised for its AI recruiting tools.
Anthemis Group recently closed its $106 million fund, focusing on early-stage financial services investments. Dealroom.co raised $7M to expand its global tech ecosystem mapping. DealRoom provides M&A tools and insights.
